test.name: TC04 - Nonexistent Booking Should Not Be Updated

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=auth_session, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=10, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth path_url=/auth headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "admin", "password": "password123"}'

/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'restful-booker.herokuapp.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=booking_session, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=10, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/999999 path_url=/booking/999999 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'token=d7c56b5c288aebf', 'Content-Length': '194'} body=b'{"firstname": "UpdatedName", "lastname": "Demir", "totalprice": "200", "depositpaid": "true", "additionalneeds": "Breakfast", "bookingdates": {"checkin": "2026-06-01", "checkout": "2026-06-10"}}'
